title: Insecure Cookie Management: Using Cookies Without the 'Secure' Flag
description: This rule checks for the usage of cookies without the 'secure' flag, which can lead to sensitive data exposure during unencrypted HTTP requests. Compliant solutions set the 'secure' flag to true.
recommendation: Set the 'secure' flag to true when creating cookies.
impact: Sensitive data exposure during unencrypted HTTP requests

checks.message: Set the 'secure' flag to true when creating cookies
